title: [Artistic Expressions, Backroom]
description: Wood-framed canvases cover the walls of the shop, their surfaces splattered with vivid paints applied by both brushes and hands, the floor below them speckled in a rainbow of color.  Triangular shelves are affixed at the corners of the room, each one filled with a variety of wares scattered between glass jars of paint and pots of dark-colored ink.  Slivers of light cut through a stained glass dome set high above, casting kaleidoscopic shadows across the wooden planks.
